## ❓ Question
**What would you like to know?**

## 📖 Context
**Help us understand your question better:**

- **What are you trying to do?**
- **Where are you stuck?**
- **What have you already tried?**

## 🔍 What You've Already Checked
**To help us answer quickly, tell us what you've already looked at:**

- [ ] Checked [GETTING_STARTED.md](../../GETTING_STARTED.md)
- [ ] Checked [FAQ.md](../../docs/FAQ.md)
- [ ] Checked [EXTENDED_FAQ.md](../../docs/EXTENDED_FAQ.md)
- [ ] Searched existing issues
- [ ] Searched documentation

## 📚 Related Documentation
**Links to any relevant docs you've read:**

- [Document Name](../path/to/doc.md)

## 🖥️ Environment Info (if relevant)
- **OS:** 
- **Python Version:** 
- **Relevant Packages:** 
- **Module/Lesson:** 

## 📝 Additional Details
**Anything else that would help us understand your question?**

**Note:** Questions help everyone! Even "obvious" questions often help others who wondered the same thing.
